cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir! This is Ramesh from Dropbox. How are you today, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm doing well, thank you. What's this call about, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We're just following up on the software issue you had resolved recently. I hope everything is working smoothly now, haan?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, everything seems fine. The solution worked as expected.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, that's great to hear! We're always here to help. Can you tell me a little bit about your experience with our support team?
